# AI Workplace Productivity Assistant

> AI-powered assistant that helps professionals automate everyday workplace tasks — drafting emails, summarizing meeting notes, planning the workday, and chatting with an AI copilot.

Built for the CAPACITI AI Skill Accelerator Programme. AI features are powered by the Lovable AI Gateway.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the assistant and its productivity features.
- [Smart Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails by recipient type, subject, purpose, and tone.
- [Meeting Notes Summarizer](/notes): Turn raw meeting notes into summaries, key points, decisions, action items, deadlines, and responsible persons.
- [AI Task Planner](/planner): Build a prioritized, time-blocked daily schedule from your tasks and priorities.
- [About](/about): What the assistant does and how to use AI output responsibly.
